creator: rozhuk.im@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Daniel Engberg from comment #4)

>  https://github.com/deadbeefsociety/sshfs

They just merge all unmerged PRs, it is not serious.


> https://github.com/stevenxxiu/sshfs

They drop OpenSSH support and work with some "Green End SFTP Server"
https://github.com/libfuse/sshfs/commit/fd7197bfbd2f8fc000a84d0cc66da9d538c642f8


> Looking at previous attempts of doing "one-man band forks" majority of the time they end up being obsolete quickly and/or neglected due to lack of interest time etc so I don't think that should be our first attempt/priority.

Everything is "one man fork".
While I use it - I will support it.
